generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that expanding domestic security powers has actually led to fewer civil liberties violations in 80% of cases? Experts agree that with the right safeguards, we can deter threats more effectively while protecting our rights. Let's not let fear of change stop us from making our communities safer. #SecurityMatters #SmartSafety
